creator: b.shertenlieb@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #5)

Hey Vlad...

I sent a private message to the person who announced the latest release on the Plex forums shortly after I posted my previous comment... I am waiting for a response from them... Hopefully I will get a reply back...

As far as I know, ilregardless of the current package message, hardware transcoding WAS disabled in FreeBSD versions of Plex Media Server last year sometime... Actually, after going back through the release notes from May 2023, for version 1.32.2.7002 it states:

  (Transcoder) Removed support for Intel hardware transcoding on FreeBSD.

I not sure if Nvidia was ever supported, as I said previously, I don't use hardware transcoding on my system...When I tried to contact someone the time about the package message, I was going to ask them to remove the parts about GPU support but never got a reply. I didn't peruse it further, hoping that Plex would fix the hardware transcoding problem in some following release... However, that has not happened to date...

Ben
